problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
hypothesis: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Epigenetic. Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
